method: Deterministic onboarding flow replay from code paths in frontend/src/app/onboarding/page.tsx before and after UX-005 changes.

assumptions.rationale: Onboarding UI states an estimated 12-20 minute setup. Using 90 seconds per required gate check models the lower-bound path consistently across before/after flows.

needs_verification: Validate these modeled deltas against production onboarding telemetry once live tenant event samples are collected.
